targets.rawQueryText:
WITH monthly_last AS (
  SELECT
    r.source_id AS meter,
    r.series AS serie,
    date(
      datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime'),
      'start of month',
      CASE
        WHEN strftime('%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime')) = '01 00:00:00' THEN '-1 month'
        ELSE '+0 month'
      END
    ) AS month_start_local,
    r.value / 1000.0 AS end_kwh,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY
        r.source_id,
        r.series,
        date(
          datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime'),
          'start of month',
          CASE
            WHEN strftime('%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime')) = '01 00:00:00' THEN '-1 month'
            ELSE '+0 month'
          END
        )
      ORDER BY r.target_time_utc DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM raw_readings r
  WHERE r.source_type = 'smartmeter'
    AND r.series IN ('BEZUG', 'EINSP')
    AND r.source_id IN ('${meter_netz}', '${meter_haus}')
),
month_end AS (
  SELECT meter, serie, month_start_local, end_kwh
  FROM monthly_last
  WHERE rn = 1
),
month_diff AS (
  SELECT
    meter,
    serie,
    month_start_local,
    end_kwh,
    end_kwh - LAG(end_kwh) OVER (PARTITION BY meter, serie ORDER BY month_start_local) AS diff_kwh
  FROM month_end
)
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m', month_start_local) AS Month,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Netz Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Netz Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Haus Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Haus Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Netz Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Netz Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Haus Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Haus Einspeisung"
FROM month_diff
GROUP BY month_start_local
ORDER BY month_start_local DESC;
targets.queryText:
WITH monthly_last AS (
  SELECT
    r.source_id AS meter,
    r.series AS serie,
    date(
      datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime'),
      'start of month',
      CASE
        WHEN strftime('%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime')) = '01 00:00:00' THEN '-1 month'
        ELSE '+0 month'
      END
    ) AS month_start_local,
    r.value / 1000.0 AS end_kwh,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY
        r.source_id,
        r.series,
        date(
          datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime'),
          'start of month',
          CASE
            WHEN strftime('%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(r.target_time_utc, 'localtime')) = '01 00:00:00' THEN '-1 month'
            ELSE '+0 month'
          END
        )
      ORDER BY r.target_time_utc DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM raw_readings r
  WHERE r.source_type = 'smartmeter'
    AND r.series IN ('BEZUG', 'EINSP')
    AND r.source_id IN ('${meter_netz}', '${meter_haus}')
),
month_end AS (
  SELECT meter, serie, month_start_local, end_kwh
  FROM monthly_last
  WHERE rn = 1
),
month_diff AS (
  SELECT
    meter,
    serie,
    month_start_local,
    end_kwh,
    end_kwh - LAG(end_kwh) OVER (PARTITION BY meter, serie ORDER BY month_start_local) AS diff_kwh
  FROM month_end
)
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m', month_start_local) AS Month,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Netz Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Netz Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Haus Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'BEZUG' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Haus Bezug",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Netz Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_netz}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Netz Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN end_kwh END), 3) AS "Haus Einspeisung",
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN meter = '${meter_haus}' AND serie = 'EINSP' THEN diff_kwh END), 3) AS "Diff Haus Einspeisung"
FROM month_diff
GROUP BY month_start_local
ORDER BY month_start_local DESC;

panels.title: Month-end Readings (kWh) + Difference to Previous Month

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source_id FROM raw_readings WHERE source_type='smartmeter' ORDER BY source_id DESC;
